name: Block, Inc.
description: Block, Inc. is an American technology company focused on financial services, formerly known as Square, Inc. Founded in 2009, the company provides a diverse ecosystem of products and services, including Square for merchant payment processing, Cash App for personal finance, Afterpay for buy-now-pay-later services, TIDAL for music streaming, and Bitkey for bitcoin wallet solutions. Headquartered in the United States, Block aims to increase economic empowerment by building accessible tools that help individuals and businesses participate in the global economy through innovative financial technology and integrated software solutions.
